2604.14030.title: Dual-Enhancement Product Bundling: Bridging Interactive Graph and Large Language Model
2604.14030.paper_summary: Product bundling boosts e-commerce revenue by recommending complementary item combinations. However, existing methods face two critical challenges: (1) collaborative filtering approaches struggle with cold-start items owing to dependency on historical interactions, and (2) LLMs lack inherent capability to model interactive graph directly. To bridge this gap, we propose a dual-enhancement method that integrates interactive graph learning and LLM-based semantic understanding for product bundling. Our method introduces a graph-to-text paradigm, which leverages a Dynamic Concept Binding Mechanism (DCBM) to translate graph structures into natural language prompts. The DCBM plays a critical role in aligning domain-specific entities with LLM tokenization, enabling effective comprehension of combinatorial constraints. Experiments on three benchmarks (POG, POG_dense, Steam) demonstrate 6.3%-26.5% improvements over state-of-the-art baselines.
2604.14030.paper_summary_zh: 產品綁定透過推薦互補商品組合來提升電子商務收入。<lb/>然而，現有方法面臨兩個關鍵挑戰：(1) 協同過濾方法因依賴歷史互動而在冷啟動項目上掙扎，(2) LLM 本身缺乏直接建模互動圖的能力。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們提出了一種雙重增強方法，將互動圖學習和基於 LLM 的語義理解整合於產品綁定中。<lb/>我們的方法引入了一種圖到文本的範式，利用動態概念綁定機制（DCBM）將圖結構轉換為自然語言提示。<lb/>DCBM 在將特定領域的實體與 LLM 的標記化對齊方面發揮了關鍵作用，使得對組合約束的有效理解成為可能。<lb/>在三個基準（POG、POG_dense、Steam）上的實驗顯示，相較於最先進的基準，我們的方法提高了 6.3%-26.5%。
2604.14030.author: Zhe Huang et.al.
2604.14030.authors: Zhe Huang, Peng Wang, Yan Zheng, Sen Song, Longjun Cai
